items.title: Identity trust-chain abuse in hybrid cloud onboarding flows
items.summary: Escalation paths can emerge when federated identity mappings and legacy role assumptions overlap during migrations.
items.expert_advice: Validate transitive trust assumptions, enforce time-bound role grants, and run adversarial chain simulations before cutover.

items.title: Fallback endpoint exposure during release rollback
items.summary: Teams often secure primary API paths but overlook emergency fallback routes and debug interfaces under rollback conditions.
items.expert_advice: Add rollback-path tests to pre-release gates and require policy parity checks for all fallback routes.

items.title: Runtime token leakage risk in ephemeral workloads
items.summary: Short-lived workloads can still expose metadata-derived credentials when runtime boundary controls are not hardened.
items.expert_advice: Harden metadata access, isolate workload identity contexts, and monitor abnormal token usage bursts.

items.title: Board reports overloaded with vulnerability volume and no decision asks
items.summary: Risk committees increasingly request concise business impact scenarios and explicit decision options over technical volume metrics.
items.expert_advice: Use a one-page board brief with risk delta, decision table, and owner-backed accountability metrics.

items.title: Alert fatigue masking lateral movement indicators
items.summary: High-volume alert streams can hide chained identity and application events that indicate active lateral movement.
items.expert_advice: Correlate identity, API, and cloud events into chain-based detections instead of isolated event scoring.

items.title: Reopened findings after incomplete fix validation
items.summary: Teams close tickets quickly but skip adversarial retest verification, causing recurring exploitable paths.
items.expert_advice: Require closure evidence, retest pass criteria, and monthly reopened-risk reviews with engineering owners.
